description: Starting the Android emulator, building the app, deploying APK, and starting Metro/server is a multi-step manual sequence repeated across many jhana sessions
Repetitive manual git operations (commit, push, create branch, move commits, create PR, merge, checkout master) that follow the same patterns across sessions and projects
Chrome Web Store screenshot and promotional image generation requires running scripts, tweaking parameters, and re-running — a cycle repeated multiple times per store listing update
User repeatedly dumps context to memory files before session reset, then reloads from memory in a new session — a recurring manual pattern for context continuity
Store listing copy polishing involves manually installing humanizer plugin, reloading, invoking skill, reviewing, and iterating — a multi-step manual workflow recurring with each store update
